title: mandevilla pohliana
intro: Mandevilla pohliana, also known as the "Rangoon Creeper," is a type of flowering vine native to Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Mandevilla pohliana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even treat certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
